name: MP
Description: Seed placed (dropped) manually in prepared furrow

name: MD
Description: Seed placed manually in hole from dibble stick or similar

name: JP
Description: Jab-type  planter (e.g., "matraca") that drops seed as hole is opened

name: SD
Description: Seed-drill where seed are essentially poured continuously as drill advances

name: PL
Description: Planter where individual seed are dropped in a furrow

name: PP
Description: Precision planter where seed are dropped individually with controlled, uniform spacing

name: FD
Description: Fluid-drilled, where seed are delivered in a fluid

name: ST
Description: Seed tape or similar where seed are atached or embedded in a biodegradable tape or similar

name: BR
Description: Seed are broadcast over the field

name: AT
Description: Stock is transplanted using machine to assist process (e.g., to present stock to worker)
